title: paetukutuku IATF
summary: Ko te pae tūmatanui mō te International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: I hiahiatia e te IATF tētahi whare tūmatanui pūmau e whakamārama ana i te tauira, e whakarārangitia ana ngā kaupapa, e tohu ana hoki i ngā kaitohutohu ki te taahiraa e whai ake nei.
why: Ko te pae ko te tatau o mua tūmatanui o IATF. Kei te hanga te reira rite te kaupapa pūmau iti kia noho reira ngāwari ki te pānui i, te whakamaori, me te mau tonu i roto i te tuwhera.
scopeIn: Ngā whārangi taunga tūmatanui e whakamārama ana i te tauira IATF
Te rēhita tūmatanui o ngā kaupapa IATF kua whakaaetia, kei te whakahaerehia, kua pūrangahia hoki me te tūnga, te kaitiaki, te rokiroki, me te whakaaturanga
He whārangi tono whakauru me te puka
Ngā whārangi whakahaere me te mārama
Pūtake Ingarihi me te hanganga kua rite mo te whakamaoritanga
Te whakatinanatanga tūmau i runga i Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Ngā wāhi mema tūmataiti, pūkete, rerenga takiuru rānei
Te manaaki i te waehere pūtake kaupapa, e noho ana i roto i te whare putunga o ia kaupapa
Kōrerorero wā-tūturu, e ora ana i roto i Discord
Te aroturuki take mo nga kaupapa takitahi, e noho ana i roto i te whare putunga GitHub o ia kaupapa

title: Ko te IATF selfie
summary: He tauira IATF wawe, kua tiakina i muri i te taenga atu ki te waahi tuuturu.
problem: Te tūhura wawe o tētahi taputapu e arotahi ana ki te āheitanga i raro i te kopare IATF.
why: Kei te puritia te repository tūmatanui rite te pūkete o te mahi, ahakoa kua mutu te whanaketanga hohe.
scopeIn: He tauira tōmua o tētahi taputapu e arotahi ana ki te uru atu, e puritia ana hei pūkete tūmatanui
scopeOut: Te whanaketanga kaha, te mahi āhuatanga rānei
Te whakamahinga tūtohutia i roto i te hanga

title: Ko te IATF bot
summary: He bot hapori IATF, kua tiakina i muri i te taenga atu ki te waahi tuuturu.
problem: Automation huri noa i ngā hongere hapori IATF.
why: Kei te puritia te repository tūmatanui rite te pūkete o te mahi, ahakoa kua mutu te whanaketanga hohe.
scopeIn: Ko te mahi aunoa o te tautohetohe huri noa i nga hongere hapori IATF, i puritia hei rekoata a te iwi
scopeOut: Te whanaketanga kaha, te mahi āhuatanga rānei
Te whakamahinga tūtohutia i roto i te hanga
